rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings and assignments that are valid in that context.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for port-based assumptions/guarantees, implementations for subcomponent-level bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Ensure AGREE expressions use types compatible with the AADL data model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL data types and names.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are represented through valid variables or outputs.
Do not assume that AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
